name: Dublin Sunday Corned Beef & Cabbage
recipeIngredient: 1 large onion, 6 cloves stuck in it
1 head cabbage (about 2 lbs), cut into quarters
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the corned beef in a large pot and cover with cold water.
2. Add all other ingredients except cabbage and bring to a boil, uncovered.
3. Reduce heat to simmer and cook for 3 hours, skimming fat as needed.
4. Remove thyme, parsley, and onion from the pot.
5. Add cabbage and simmer for an additional 20 minutes until cooked.
6. Remove meat and cut into pieces.
7. Strain the cabbage and season heavily with black pepper.
8. Serve the beef surrounded by cabbage, carrots, and potatoes.
9. Horseradish sauce: Whip cream until it forms peaks. Fold in horseradish.
